recovery_note: Rework was implemented and verified locally previously, but its handoff was not published; latest-* still pointed to UI_VISUAL_IDENTITY_POLISH_AND_HONEST_DEMO_LABELING. This publish recovers the missing rework report. No new UI changes made for the recovery.
summary: Dashboard reworked to the accepted enterprise reference, reinterpreted as a Modern Enterprise AI Command Center: icon-tiled KPI cards, connected lifecycle stepper (AI phase indigo), fuller AI-recommendation card, audit-and-cost (today) panel, recent-events feed, and three pure-SVG charts (donut/bars/line). Honest mock/demo labels, Local Demo, prototype notice, and 'Приклад використання' preserved. All 11 routes render; build PASS; 11 screenshots recaptured. No chart library or other dependency added.
